title: coix pendula
intro: Coix pendula, also known as Job's Tears, is a type of annual grass that belongs to the family Poaceae and is native to Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Coix pendula include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herb in herbal medicine. Coix pendula can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies such as soups and infusions.
